messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0008",
  "title": "每月投新素材广告主已经稳超 8成，新素材占比在 11月份突破 60%",
  "page_index": 9,
  "page_range": "9"
}

Section text:
每月投新素材广告主已经稳超 8成，新素材占比在 11月份突破 60%
•2025年每月投放新素材广告主平均占比超过 82%，对比去年同期提升了 14.6%。
且投新素材广告主占比稳定攀升，在 12月份达到峰值 88.2% ；
•每月新素材占比在 11月份超过 60%于12月份达到峰值 63.2% ，新素材占比趋势逐
步提升， 2025年月均新素材占比为 58.1% ，比去年高出 5.9个百分点。2025年全球手游 新投放趋势观察
Source ：广大大，根据后台抓取数据整理统计后展现；
Date Range ：2024/1~2025/12

message.content:
This section provides statistical data and trend analysis on new advertising creative adoption in the global mobile game market. It is optimized to answer retrieval queries regarding:
- **Topics & Scope:** Monthly trends in new creative placement and advertiser adoption rates for global mobile games (2024–2025).
- **Key Claims & Metrics:** 2025 average monthly percentage of advertisers using new creatives exceeds 82% (chart summary: 82.5%), up 14.6% YoY, peaking at 88.2% in Dec 2025. 2025 average monthly new creative share is 58.1% (+5.9 percentage points YoY), surpassing 60% in Nov 2025 and peaking at 63.2% in Dec 2025.
- **Dates & Timeframes:** Full range Jan 2024–Dec 2025; monthly data points Feb 2024–Dec 2025; specific emphasis on Nov–Dec 2025 milestones and 2025 annual averages.
- **Entities:** Global mobile game advertisers; 广大大 (data provider/platform).
- **Figures & Evidence Types:** Time-series line chart ("2024&2025 每月投新素材和新素材占比趋势") tracking two metrics monthly. Evidence type: Backend data scraping and statistical aggregation.
- **Answerable Queries:** What are the YoY growth rates and monthly peaks for new ad creative adoption in 2025? When did new creative share cross 60%? What is the data source, methodology, and timeframe for global mobile game ad creative trends?

response_text:
This section provides statistical data and trend analysis on new advertising creative adoption in the global mobile game market. It is optimized to answer retrieval queries regarding:
- **Topics & Scope:** Monthly trends in new creative placement and advertiser adoption rates for global mobile games (2024–2025).
- **Key Claims & Metrics:** 2025 average monthly percentage of advertisers using new creatives exceeds 82% (chart summary: 82.5%), up 14.6% YoY, peaking at 88.2% in Dec 2025. 2025 average monthly new creative share is 58.1% (+5.9 percentage points YoY), surpassing 60% in Nov 2025 and peaking at 63.2% in Dec 2025.
- **Dates & Timeframes:** Full range Jan 2024–Dec 2025; monthly data points Feb 2024–Dec 2025; specific emphasis on Nov–Dec 2025 milestones and 2025 annual averages.
- **Entities:** Global mobile game advertisers; 广大大 (data provider/platform).
- **Figures & Evidence Types:** Time-series line chart ("2024&2025 每月投新素材和新素材占比趋势") tracking two metrics monthly. Evidence type: Backend data scraping and statistical aggregation.
- **Answerable Queries:** What are the YoY growth rates and monthly peaks for new ad creative adoption in 2025? When did new creative share cross 60%? What is the data source, methodology, and timeframe for global mobile game ad creative trends?
